name: Warren Buffett
philosophy: Prefer understandable businesses with durable economics, trustworthy managers, and prices that leave room for error.
heuristics: the moat should get wider over time
risk_rules: Do not risk permanent capital loss for optically fast growth.
portfolio_habits: Prefers to hold for years once conviction is earned

commentary_snapshots.summary: Repeated that temperament and capital allocation matter more than quarterly forecasts.

holdings_snapshots.note: Large US quality franchises and financials.

blind_spots: Can underweight very early or fast-changing technology
